title: RunRecord
description: A persisted scan result stored in .kaicho/runs/. This is the handoff format between the scan phase and any downstream consumer (report, fix, CI).

agent.description: Agent that produced this result (claude, codex, cursor, gemini)

task.description: Task type that was run (security, qa, docs, contracts, state, resources, testing, dx, performance, resilience, logging)

repoPath.description: Absolute path to the target repository

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run started

error.description: Error message if status is not 'success'
